title: insert_me Targets File
description: List of evaluation-only C/C++ source tree roots for multi-target corpus planning (plan-portfolio / generate-portfolio).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this targets collection.

targets.description: Ordered list of named source-tree targets.

name.description: Short identifier used in artifact paths and case_id prefixes. Must be unique within the file. Use only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores.

path.description: Path to the C/C++ source tree root. May be absolute or relative (resolved against the targets file directory).
